body:
{"note_id":"dda8ed70-de8f-4d3d-b41d-208c36ff4deb","user_id":"e2c51414-40b1-701b-493d-a6179aadad96","session_id":null,"title":"First test of Note Saving","content":"This Biomedical Catalyst proposal demonstrates strong understanding of a genuine healthcare challenge in clinical trial recruitment, with excellent quantification and competitive analysis

Exceptionally well-quantified healthcare challenge with specific, credible metrics (>80% trial delays, £6M+ costs, <1% enrollment, 4 hours per participant coordinator burden) supported by cited references

Absence of explicit direct stakeholder input evidence—no quotes, survey results, or formal validation from healthcare professionals, patients, or trial coordinators described

Add explicit stakeholder validation section with 2-3 brief quotes from trial coordinators, investigators, or patients describing recruitment challenges in their own words to demonstrate direct healthcare professional and patient input","ai_summary":null,"created_at":"2026-01-29T12:27:51.479Z","updated_at":"2026-01-29T12:27:51.479Z"}
